  1. de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.crossover

Verwendungen von Schnittstelle
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.crossover.Crossover

Packages, die Crossover verwenden
Package
Beschreibung
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config
Contains configuration models and parsing logic that bind TOML settings to the engine.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core
Contains the fundamental, problem-agnostic building blocks of the Darwinian evolutionary engine.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.crossover
Contains implementations of the Crossover operator for the Darwinian Engine.

  • Verwendungen von Crossover in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config

    Felder in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.config, die deklariert sind als Crossover
    Modifikator und Typ
    Feld
    Beschreibung
    Crossover<Character>
    CryptanalysisGAConfig.crossover
    Crossover operator used to recombine parent solutions.
    Crossover<Integer>
    KnapsackGAConfig.crossover
    Crossover operator used to recombine parent solutions.
    Crossover<Integer>
    SudokuGAConfig.crossover
     
    Crossover<SymRegNode>
    SymRegGAConfig.crossover
     
    Crossover<Integer>
    TSPGAConfig.crossover
    Crossover operator used to recombine parent tours.

  • Verwendungen von Crossover in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core

    Konstruktoren in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core mit Parametern vom Typ Crossover
    Modifikator
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
     
    GeneticAlgorithm(ConsoleOutput consoleOutput, Selection<T> selection, Crossover<T> crossover, Mutation<T> mutation, FitnessFunction<T> fitnessFunction, double crossoverRate, double mutationRate)
    Creates a new genetic algorithm instance with the specified components.

  • Verwendungen von Crossover in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.crossover

    Klassen in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.crossover, die Crossover implementieren
    Modifikator und Typ
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    class 
    CycleCrossover<T>
    Description: Identifies cycles between two parent chromosomes and swaps the genes within those cycles.
    class 
    OnePointCrossover<T>
    Description: Randomly selects a single division point along the genome length.
    class 
    OrderedCrossover<T>
    Description: Extracts a contiguous sub-sequence of genes from one parent and maps them directly into the offspring at the exact same index.
    class 
    SubtreeCrossover
    Description: Simulates biological crossover by picking a random internal node from both parents and physically swapping the entire trailing sub-branches.
    class 
    SudokuBlockCrossover
    Description: An inherently 2-dimensional crossover mechanic.
    class 
    TwoPointCrossover<T>
    Description: Randomly selects two division points along the genome length.
    class 
    UniformCrossover<T>
    Description: Iterates through each gene index and tosses a coin (50% probability) to decide which parent provides the gene to which child.
